Info

Inspiration garden

Writing • Design • Music • Visual
2024

People

  • Suengmee Lee– an inspiring interaction designer
  • Steph Ango– design polygot, building thought making software
  • Andy Matuschak– an original thought-tool creator
  • Michæl Hilgers– an architect turned industrial designer

Sites

  • Oblique Strategies– draw inspiration from a single sentence, created by Brian Eno and Peter Schmidt
  • Posts.cv– a social network full of creative ideas
  • Cargo– some great portfolio inspiration
  • Objects and Sounds– music to hold and appreciate
  • Norns.community– creative code to create auditory delights
  • llllllll (aka lines)– discussions of creativity
  • Music, Arts and Culture archive– a digital repository

One particularly fun source of inspiration is this list of sayings I like.
